vocab.meaning: phản xạ tự nhiên (do làm quá nhiều nên không cần suy nghĩ)
vocab.example: Typing on a laptop has become second nature to me since I use it for at least eight hours a day.

vocab.word: at the touch of a button
vocab.meaning: vô cùng nhanh chóng và dễ dàng (chỉ bằng một nút bấm)
vocab.example: I love how desktop keyboards allow me to access complex shortcuts at the touch of a button, streamlining my workflow.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được cách làm/quen với cái gì đó
vocab.example: It took me a while to get the hang of the mechanical keyboard's sensitivity, but now I can't go back to a membrane one.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể thiếu
vocab.example: Using a keyboard is part and parcel of my daily routine as a digital nomad.

vocab.meaning: thử làm cái gì đó (lần đầu tiên)
vocab.example: I decided to give an ergonomic split keyboard a whirl to see if it would help with my persistent wrist pain.
Thanks to years of practice, typing a 2,000-word essay on my desktop is a piece of cake for me.

vocab.meaning: đạt đến tốc độ tối đa/cập nhật thông tin nhanh
vocab.example: The responsive keys on my new laptop really help me get up to speed when I have to meet tight deadlines.
I mostly use my laptop keyboard because I'm constantly on the go and need to work from various locations.

vocab.meaning: có công mài sắt có ngày nên kim
vocab.example: I used to be a slow typist, but practice makes perfect, and now I can type without even looking at the keys.
High-end mechanical keyboards can definitely break the bank, but the tactile experience is worth every penny.
